    MissionTypes:6IOEzRl53kiqfNVcP0kvlw

    labelCounter attack! - Part 22 (0-0)
    titleCounter attack! - Part 22
    majorTypestatic
    nextMissionVJ5R08GtnkGyryu6LHNXzg
    dropJjTRoQzW8kCd_fvc158Keg
    key6IOEzRl53kiqfNVcP0kvlw
    descriptionAF Scientist: “Most interesting, the planet lacks an atmosphere and any breathable gasses… quite the harsh environment for living on. This probably means that the Nexar doesn’t use sound for communication. Perhaps this explains why they haven’t answered any of our communication attempts. Strange… I read your report about Xhargreg… seems like he was able to speak. Anyway back to the war… Admiral McArthur requested that you assist in capturing the Nexar Recycle station located in the 2nd ring.”
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionAdmiral McArthur: “Excellent, seems like your reputation didn’t actually exceed you. This war is starting to go very well for us now. However a new threat have been reported, a force called the Nexar Elite is defending the inner circles. Your next task is to find and defeat a member of the Nexar Elite.”
    addedBodies["t_k-f0yUVUyA7IhgC4EVyQ"]
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    typetransport
    maxLvl0
